meta.description: Browse Reddit better on your mobile than ever before!
meta.title: Acorn: Reddit for mobile

app.1: Our app is open source and we don't collect any personally identifiable data like your real name or email address.
app.2: We use Reddit to authenticate you with Acorn and never receive or store your password at any point.
app.3: We collect your Reddit username and send it to Sentry, our error tracking provider. Refer to their <sentryLink>privacy policy</sentryLink>
app.title: App

website.1: Our website doesn't use any cookies or collect any data
website.title: Website
